name: live freshness gate: each demotion appends an entry to the rule's rule_state_history field with {timestamp, from, to, reason:freshness-stale}
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch && echo "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z" > .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch/my-src.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/freshness-gate.sh" --apply-to-rules --tree "$PWD/tree" --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z --update-source-files 2>/dev/null && grep "freshness-stale" tree/google/x.yaml 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
setup:
mkdir -p tree/google && printf 'source:
  id: my-src
  authoritative_publisher: M
  authoritative_url: https://m.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2024-01-01T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
  fetch_frequency: daily
  fragility_tier: low
  license_note: MIT
rules:
  - {id: g-x-001, name: x, description: x, detector: x, type: problem, fixable: null, has_suggestions: false, deprecated: false, replaced_by: [], docs_url: https://x.com, requires_type_checking: false, recommended: true, options_schema: {}, messages: {default: x}, severity: P1, version: 1.0.0, semver: 1.0.0, rule_state: block, rule_state_history: [], provenance: [{source: my-src, class: published-standard, section_id: 1, url: https://m.com, fetched_at: 2024-01-01T00:00:00Z, content_hash: sha256:S}]}
recommended_set: [g-x-001]
all_set: [g-x-001]
' > tree/google/x.yaml
